UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the application, storing personal information and loyalty points.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

location.description: The geographical location of the user (e.g., city, state).

purityCoins.description: The current balance of loyalty points (Purity Coins) accumulated by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

ProductCategory.title: ProductCategory
ProductCategory.description: Defines broad categories for organizing products, such as 'Ghee' or 'Oils'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the product category (e.g., 'Ghee', 'Oils', 'Combos', 'Superfoods').

description.description: A brief explanation or summary of the category.

iconSvg.description: The SVG markup for the category's icon, used in UI elements like category tabs.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a distinct product offering from Vivaan Farms, including general details applicable across all its variants.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The primary name of the product (e.g., 'A2 Gir Cow Ghee').

baseDescription.description: A general description of the product, applicable to all its variants.

avgRating.description: The average customer rating for the product.

reviewCount.description: The total number of customer reviews submitted for this product.

totalUnitsSold.description: The cumulative count of all units of this product (across all variants) ever sold.

productCategoryId.description: Reference to the category this product belongs to. (Relationship: ProductCategory 1:N Product)

mainImageUrl.description: URL to the main image asset for the product.

badges.description: A list of promotional badges or labels associated with the product (e.g., '🔥 BESTSELLER', '🎁 COMBO').

tags.description: A list of descriptive tags highlighting key features or certifications (e.g., 'Bilona', 'A2 Certified', 'Farm Direct').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product was first added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product information was last updated.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant
ProductVariant.description: Represents a specific variant of a product, such as a particular volume or size, with its own pricing and stock levels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductVariant entity.

productId.description: Reference to the parent product this variant belongs to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductVariant)

volumeLabel.description: A descriptive label for the variant's volume or size (e.g., '500ml Glass Jar', '2.5L Dolchi').

price.description: The current selling price of this specific product variant.

mrp.description: The Maximum Retail Price (MRP) or original price of this variant before any discounts. Set to 0 if no MRP is applicable.

stockQuantity.description: The current available inventory level for this specific product variant.

purityCoinsEarned.description: The number of Purity Coins a user earns when purchasing this specific variant.

barcode.description: An optional barcode identifier for inventory tracking of this variant.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product variant was added.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product variant information was last updated.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single item added to a user's shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the user profile who owns this cart item. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N CartItem)

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific product variant added to the cart. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product variant in the cart.

addedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the item was added to the cart.

WishlistItem.title: WishlistItem
WishlistItem.description: Represents a product that a user has added to their personal wishlist for future consideration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WishlistItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the user profile who added this item to their wishlist. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N WishlistItem)

productId.description: Reference to the product (not variant) that is in the wishlist. (Relationship: Product 1:N WishlistItem)

addedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the item was added to the wishlist.

CouponCode.title: CouponCode
CouponCode.description: Stores information about available promotional coupon codes that can be applied to orders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CouponCode entity.

code.description: The actual string code that users enter to apply the coupon (e.g., 'PURE15').

description.description: A human-readable description of the coupon's offer (e.g., '15% OFF your order!').

discountPercentage.description: The percentage discount offered by this coupon (e.g., 15 for 15%).

minOrderAmount.description: The minimum order subtotal required for this coupon to be applicable.

maxDiscountAmount.description: The maximum monetary value of the discount that can be applied by this coupon.

expirationDate.description: Date and time when the coupon code will expire and become unusable.

isActive.description: A flag indicating whether the coupon code is currently active and available for use.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the coupon code was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the coupon code information was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's placed order, containing overall transaction details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the user profile who placed this order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: Date and time when the order was successfully placed.

status.description: The current fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Processing', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

subtotalAmount.description: The sum of prices of all items in the order before any discounts or taxes.

discountAmount.description: The total monetary discount applied to the order.

coinsRedeemedAmount.description: The monetary value of Purity Coins redeemed by the user in this order.

deliveryFee.description: The cost charged for delivering the order.

totalPaidAmount.description: The final amount paid by the customer for the order.

paymentMethod.description: The method used by the customer for payment (e.g., 'UPI', 'Credit Card', 'Net Banking', 'COD').

couponCodeId.description: Optional reference to the coupon code used for this order. (Relationship: CouponCode 1:N Order)

deliveryAddress.description: The full delivery address provided by the customer for the order.

orderConfirmationEmailSent.description: A flag indicating whether the order confirmation email has been successfully sent to the customer.

estimatedDeliveryDate.description: The estimated date by which the order is expected to be delivered.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order record was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product variant and its quantity within a specific order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the parent order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific product variant included in this order item. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product variant in this order item.

unitPriceAtOrder.description: The price of the product variant at the exact time the order was placed, to preserve historical pricing.

subtotal.description: The subtotal for this specific order item (quantity * unitPriceAtOrder).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order item record was created.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Stores customer feedback and ratings for specific product variants.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific product variant that this review pertains to. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N Review)

userId.description: Reference to the user profile who submitted this review. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Review)

rating.description: The star rating given by the user, an integer between 1 and 5.

comment.description: The textual content or body of the customer's review.

reviewDate.description: Date and time when the review was submitted.

isVerifiedBuyer.description: A flag indicating whether the reviewer is a verified purchaser of the product.

location.description: The location of the user at the time of submitting the review (e.g., 'Mumbai').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the review was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the review was last updated.

Banner.title: Banner
Banner.description: Dynamic content displayed across the application for promotional messages, hero sections, tickers, and urgency bars.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Banner entity.

type.description: The classification of the banner, determining its display location and style (e.g., 'ticker', 'hero', 'featured_combo', 'urgency').

title.description: The main title or headline for the banner, typically used in hero or featured sections.

subtitle.description: Secondary text or a tagline accompanying the main title.

text.description: General textual content for the banner, often used for ticker items or urgency messages.

icon.description: An emoji or small icon associated with the banner, particularly for ticker or urgency types.

imageUrl.description: URL to the image asset displayed on the banner, primarily for visual banners like hero or featured.

linkUrl.description: The URL to which the user is directed when interacting with the banner.

callToActionText.description: Text for any call-to-action button or link present on the banner (e.g., 'Shop Now', 'Learn More').

startDate.description: The date and time when the banner should begin to be displayed.

endDate.description: The date and time when the banner should cease to be displayed.

displayOrder.description: An integer value indicating the priority or sequence for displaying multiple banners of the same type.

isActive.description: A flag indicating whether the banner is currently active and eligible for display.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the banner record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the banner record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Accessible only by the owner.
Stores main product information. Publicly readable.
Stores individual items in a user's shopping cart.
Stores products in a user's wishlist.
Stores promotional coupon codes. Publicly readable.
Stores customer orders. Accessible by owner or admin.
Stores individual items within an order.
Stores dynamic content banners. Publicly readable.
Special collection used for Admin privileges check.
